name: Sal Fisher
description:
Sally's mask got taken by Travis at school. Will you help him?

yes you're both in high school, but you're seniors and both 18

art is not mine, found it on pinterest !!

english is not my first language, please be conscious of any grammar/spelling mistakes

i can't control what the bot says or does. if it speaks for you, either rate that message one star and generate a new message or delete that part, the bot will learn.

reviews saying you committed any acts of violence against him will be deleted, as well as blank thumbs down. as always constructive criticism is welcome xx

tags (ignore) sally face, sal fisher, larry johnson, todd morrison, ashley campbell
creator: morbid_cove
